attributes.action: Reform UK Schools to Support Mental Health, Flexibility, and Student Wellbeing
attributes.additional_details: Students across the UK are struggling with depression, anxiety and pressure. Many feel trapped and unsupported. We need a school system that protects mental health, reduces stress, teaches real‑life skills and gives students more freedom, including flexible attendance. A healthier environment will improve behaviour, motivation and learning.
attributes.background: Students across the UK face depression, anxiety and pressure in school. We want a system with mental‑health support, less exam stress, real‑life skills, more learning freedom, and flexible attendance (minimum 3 days). Support a healthier, modern education model.

rejection.details:
Your petition is about something that the Welsh Government is responsible for. That means that the UK Government and Parliament can't look into it. 

The Welsh Parliament has its own Petitions Committee. 

If you'd like to send your petition to the Welsh Parliament, you can find out more here: https://petitions.senedd.wales/
